NAVAREA XIX 82/18
NORWEGIAN SEA
1.RIGLIST CORRECT AT 021830 UTC JULY 18.
NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
72-01.4N - 020-29,3E LEIV EIRIKSSON
71-14,6N - 022-15,0E SONGA ENABLER
67-05,9N - 006-51,5E TRANSOCEAN SPITSBERGEN
65-15.4N - 006-42.3E ISLAND INNOVATOR
65-10,5N - 006-50,9E SONGA ENCOURAGE

NOTES:
A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METER SAFETY ZONE.
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
2.CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 78/18
